data.body:
SCENARIO 7 (races + negatives) PASS live — ACL enforcement (ADR-0025 decision 3). Probed as NON-MEMBER identity rebar-review-bot (id 1000002; in Registered+Service Users, NOT feature-branch-drivers, NOT Administrators): (7c) feature/* branch CREATE -> HTTP 403 'not permitted: create on refs/heads/feature/neg-*', branch NOT created. (7b) --no-ff MERGE push to refs/for/main -> REJECTED 'commit d41c79b: you are not allowed to upload merges' (the exclusive pushMerge ACL; pushMerge=feature-branch-drivers only). POSITIVE contrast: JoeOakhartNava (feature-branch-driver) successfully merge-pushed+submitted change 254 (scenario 3). (7a) concurrent sibling submits behaving = scenario 1 (251+252 both landed, 2nd via merge-if-necessary). (7d) webhook backfill + concurrency cancel-in-progress = S3 AC5 precedent (change 234 PS1 run cancelled on PS2 push) + reconciler runbook.

SCENARIO 4 (vote-carry on re-merge) — proven live by S3 AC4 (docs/88ab-feature-branch-evidence.md): change 234 PS3 MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE -> Gerrit 'Copied Votes: LLM-Review+1' CARRIED while Verified REMOVED + CI re-dispatched (run 28682539519); REWORK counter-case change 215 PS2 -> BOTH votes wiped. Identical mechanism/copyCondition this epic ships; cited rather than re-run to avoid redundant main churn.
